titleStmt.title: SII 16.40: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 40. (A.R. No. 615 of 1907.) NANDALŪRU, RAJAMPET TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the outer gōpura, left of the entrance, Saumyanāthasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1423, Durmati, Āshāḍha śu. 12, Monday corresponding to 1501 A.D., June 28.

The inscription records a gift of the village Akimppōḍu, in his nāyaṅkara tract Pottapi-nāḍu by Parvata-nāyaniṅgāru, son of Sarnapanāyini Dēvi-nāyuḍu of Vāḷapandili-gōtra to god Chokknānthadēva of Nelandalūru, for the merit of Narasā-nāyaka. Dēvi-nāyuḍu who bears the title Toṇḍamaṇḍalasthāpanāchārya is stated to be ruling over Sirivōḷa, Siddhavaṭam, Sakali and Pottapi-nāḍu with Ghaṇḍikōṭa as his capital while his son, the donor was administering Sakali-Pottapināḍu with Siddhavaṭam as his capital.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
niraṁttarāyōstu . Ētatbraṁhmēṁdrarudrādi
mauḷimālōpalāḷitaṁ . śrīmatsuṁdaranāṁtha
sya śāsanaṁ lōkaviśrutaṁ . svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1423 Agunēṁṭi durmmati saṁvva
tsara Āṣāḍha su 12 sō nāṁṭi puṇyakālamaṁ
dunu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara mīsaragaṁḍḍa
kaṭhārisāluva sāḷuva narasiṁggarāyama
hārāyala komāruṁḍu yiṁmmaḍi na
raśiṁggarāyamahārāydu sakalaśēnā
dhīśvarasāṁmrājyahastuṁḍai vijayanagarama
ṁdduṁḍḍi rājyapratipālanaṁ cēstunna narasāṁ
nāyaṁkoḍayala Ājñepratipālaka toṁḍḍama
ṁḍḍanastāpanācārya Ādivaṁśāvatāra vāḷa
paṁdiligōtrōdbhavuṁḍai ghaṁḍikōṭarāja
dhāniṁgānu śirivoḷa siddavaṭṭaṁ sakali
pottapināṁṭi rājyālu Elucuṁ
nna sarnnapanāyani dēvinēniṁgāri ku
māruṁḍu parvatanāyaniṁgāru
tanaku śiddavaṭṭaṁ sthāyigānu sakali po
ttapināṁṭiśrīma Ājñāpālanaṁ cēstuṁḍḍi
tamanāyaṁkrānku cellē pottapināṁ
ṭi rājyamulōni Akiṁppōḍanē grāma
mu narasānāyaṁkoḍayalaku
puṇyamugānu nelaṁdalūri cokkanāṁ
thadēvuniki prātaḥkkāla dadhyōdana Ava
sarānku sahiraṁṇyōdakadāna dhārāpū
rvakamugānu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyamai sarvva
mānyaṁgānu dhāravōśi yiccina viva
raṁ Ā grāmānku tūrppunaku reḍḍimareḍḍi
pāpireḍḍi Ana mēragānunnu paḍumaṭiki ce
yeruguṁḍāla bāyili maṁdapalli
koṁṭidūbatippa gurālakoṁḍḍa pa
ḍumara virākuṁṭṭa sarisikoni Ā
reṁppāḍi polameragānunnu dakṣa
ṇānku maṁgalamōramu kāṁkarra
koṁḍḍanaḍumu bolliguṁḍlu sariśiko
ni saṁbburāyani kuṁṭṭaku tūrppu
tippameraṁgānunu vuttarānku vaḍḍigaṁ
gguvuṭu juvvimānu garusugā meragā
nunnu Ayina yalla catussīmaṁ
buṭṭina sakaḷasuvarnādāya dhānyādā
yāluga Aṁttavaṭunanu dadhyōdana pa
ḷyālu raṁṭi biyyaṁ yenimidi muṁ
ttalu perugu nālugu muṁttalu neyi A
ramuṁ ttaṁḍu gaṁdaṁ Arapalimaṁḍu
pōṁkalu padi Ākulu yiruvai yī The
Digital edition of SII 16.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
